commands.name: fork-detect
commands.description: Find relevant historical sessions across all projects
commands.prompt: Run the smart-fork detect command to find relevant sessions. Arguments: {args}

commands.name: fork-to
commands.description: Switch to a specific historical session

commands.name: index-session
commands.description: Index current session for future searching
commands.prompt: Index the current session with any provided summary or tags: {args}

commands.name: fork-status
commands.description: Show current fork status and suggestions
commands.prompt: Show fork status and suggested sessions
